title: Chats@tsown #2688
definition:
Hazezon-tamar = "dividing the date-palm"

 1) an Amorite city
 2) a town situated in the desert Judah; probably Engedi
 3) maybe the 'Tamar' of Solomon's day
nasbUsage:
Definition: Hazezon-tamar = "dividing the date-palm"

 1) an Amorite city
 2) a town situated in the desert Judah; probably Engedi
 3) maybe the 'Tamar' of Solomon's day

    NASB:  a place on the W. side of the Dead Sea, the same as 5872
